def match_candidates(jobs, candidates):
    matches = []
    for job in jobs:
        ranked = sorted(candidates, key=lambda c: c["score"], reverse=True)
        for candidate in ranked[:3]:
            if candidate["skill"] in job["required_skills"]:
                matches.append((job["id"], candidate["id"]))
    return matches

def rank_students_per_class(classes, students):
    results = {}
    for cls in classes:
        enrolled = [s for s in students if cls["id"] in s["classes"]]
        ranked = sorted(enrolled, key=lambda s: s["gpa"], reverse=True)
        results[cls["id"]] = ranked
    return results

def find_closest_stores(branches, stores):
    nearest = {}
    for branch in branches:
        by_distance = sorted(stores, key=lambda s: haversine(branch["loc"], s["loc"]))
        nearest[branch["id"]] = by_distance[0]
    return nearest
